name: Ivan Ramen Franchising LLC

red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

validation_questions: Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: UK master franchise operating status — sold September 2023, terms disclosed (£1 + 5%), but operating status, unit count, and performance not disclosed
Auditor going-concern evaluation outcome — standard evaluation language present but no emphasis-of-matter paragraph; unclear whether going-concern risk was resolved by the February 2025 $120K capital

Franchisor's ability to perform pre-opening obligations — $5,992 cash at 12/31/2024, G&A ~$80K/year; three state regulators (IL, MD, ND) independently imposed fee deferral requirements due to financia

Ivan Ramen USA LLC financial health — affiliate operating the one company-owned restaurant has borrowed $25,848 from the franchisor with no terms or interest; affiliate's financial condition not discl
State of formation discrepancy — Item 1 states 'New York limited liability company'; financial statement Note 1 states 'Delaware limited liability company'. One is incorrect.
Ghost kitchen classification — counted as 'franchised' outlet in Item 20 tables but footnoted as 'not an Ivan Ramen Restaurant'; cover page describes franchise as 'Ivan Ramen Restaurant Businesses'
Revenue recognition vs. actual revenue — $5,000 recognized in FY2024 from $25,000 Las Vegas franchise fee; ASC 606 policy states straight-line recognition over 10-year term, which would yield ~$2,500
